official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the chunks_biomes packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the chunks_biomes list body.
Official binary source for the per-chunk body element shape. The selected fixture uses an empty list, so no initialized LevelChunk, biome palette, registry contents, or game state are required.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound chunks_biomes frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official ClientboundChunksBiomesPacket(List<ChunkBiomeData>) constructor with an empty List. This is the smallest context-free fixture and does not require an initialized Level, LevelChunk, biome registry/palette contents, chunk storage, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound chunks_biomes packet framing and dispatch/decode for the official empty chunkBiomeData-list fixture only; do not infer non-empty chunk biome serialization, biome palette contents, initialized LevelChunk extraction, chunk/world hydration, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
